release_notes:
- Changed Read-Burn-Write combo flow to re-read config after burn, preserving new firmware values while restoring BD address and serial
- Added unsupported firmware popup when an unrecognized device prefix is detected
- Merged all device operations (including core dump) under the shared BlueSuite worker
- All operations now block concurrent access through a single busy guard
- Added clickable shortcuts for log file and config folder paths in the status bar
